item.title: Veradermics Oral Minoxidil
item.description:
• Summary: Veradermics announced that its oral minoxidil formulation succeeded in a late-stage trial for androgenetic alopecia (male and female pattern baldness). The drug demonstrated statistically significant hair regrowth compared to placebo, positioning it as a potential first-line oral therapy. As a publicly traded company, this marks a key milestone for Veradermics.
  • MoAs: Minoxidil is a potassium channel opener that acts as a vasodilator; it prolongs the anagen phase of hair follicles and increases blood flow to the scalp.
  • Sources: BioPharma Dive, STAT News, Endpoints News
